title: 工具上下文压力的四种应对策略
title_en: Four Approaches to Tool Context Pressure

body.overview: 工具定义和 tool_result 会持续消耗上下文窗口。工具多或对话轮次多的 agent 可能在任务完成前就耗尽上下文。四种策略分别针对不同的 token 消耗来源。

components.name: Tool Search（工具搜索）
components.role: 减少预加载的工具定义。不一次性发送所有 tool schema，而是只发一个 tool_search 工具，让 Claude 按需查找。适合 20+ 工具的场景。

components.name: Programmatic Tool Calling（编程式调用）
components.role: 减少 tool_result 往返。Claude 写一段脚本在沙箱中批量执行多个工具调用，中间结果不进入对话历史。适合可以组合为一个脚本的连续调用链。

components.name: Prompt Caching（提示缓存）
components.role: 不减少上下文中的 token 数量，但降低重复工具定义的费用。工具集稳定时，缓存一次可复用于数千次请求。

components.name: Context Editing（上下文编辑）
components.role: 清理对话历史中不再需要的旧 tool_result。适合长对话中早期结果已失去参考价值的场景。

body.flow: 识别 token 消耗来源 → 工具定义过多？用 Tool Search → 往返调用过多？用 Programmatic Calling → 定义稳定但请求量大？用 Prompt Caching → 旧结果堆积？用 Context Editing

body_en.overview: Tool definitions and tool_result blocks consume context window tokens. Agents with many tools or many turns can exhaust available context before the task is done. Four approaches target different sources of token consumption.

components.name: Tool Search
components.role: Reduces upfront tool definitions. Instead of sending all tool schemas, send a single tool_search tool and let Claude discover others on demand. Best for 20+ tool scenarios.

components.name: Programmatic Tool Calling
components.role: Reduces tool_result roundtrips. Claude writes a script that runs multiple tool calls in a sandbox; intermediate results never enter conversation history. Best for chainable call sequences.

components.name: Prompt Caching
components.role: Doesn't reduce token count but cuts cost of repeated tool definitions. Cache stable tool definitions once and reuse the prefix across thousands of requests.

components.name: Context Editing
components.role: Removes old tool_result blocks from conversation history. Best for long conversations where early results are no longer relevant.

body_en.flow: Identify token source → Too many definitions? Tool Search → Too many roundtrips? Programmatic Calling → Stable but high-volume? Prompt Caching → Stale results piling up? Context Editing
